testimonials.title: What our customers say

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How much does a stairlift cost?
faq.a1: The price varies depending on the model and installation complexity. Straight stairlifts start from €2,490. We offer financing from €38.91/month. Request a free quote and we'll give you an exact price within 24 hours.
faq.a2: A straight stairlift is installed in 3-5 days from order. Curved models take 3-4 weeks. Vertical lifts and curved platform lifts take between 4-8 weeks.
faq.q3: Do I need construction work at home?
faq.a3: No. Most of our solutions require no construction work. They are installed directly onto the existing staircase or floor.
faq.q4: What warranty comes with the products?
faq.a4: All our products include manufacturer's warranty. We also offer preventive maintenance contracts and in-house technical assistance.
faq.a5: Yes. We carry out maintenance and repair for virtually all market brands: HANDICARE, MINIVATOR, FREELIFT, ACORN, THYSSEN, BISON, VIMEC and many more.
faq.a6: Yes. We find the financing plan that best suits your situation. Monthly payments from €38.91/month.

quickQuote.title: Get your quote in 24 hours
quickQuote.subtitle: No obligation. An advisor will call you to find the best solution.
quickQuote.legal: By submitting you agree to our Privacy Policy. We only use your data to contact you.

hero.title: Experts in mobility solutions
hero.subtitle: Over 15 years helping families regain their independence.

about.title: Who we are
about.p1: Spain's leading company in the distribution, installation and maintenance of stairlifts, platform lifts, vertical elevators, pool hoists and ramps.
about.p2: SOLTEVA ELEVACIÓN makes your life easier by installing your accessibility solution while offering the professionalism, safety, confidence and warranty that comes with being an authorized distributor of the world's best manufacturers.
about.p3: All our products are ISO certified and carry the CE mark, meeting the strictest safety and quality requirements. Our technical team has qualified personnel with over 15 years of experience.

financing.title: Tailored financing
financing.desc: We find the financing plan that best suits your financial situation. We handle all the paperwork to get you the right plan. Monthly payments from €38.91/month.

consultation.title: Free initial consultation
consultation.desc: From the first contact, our team of professionals guides you on the best solutions to eliminate your accessibility problem. Home visit in under 24 hours.

installation.title: Fast and safe installation
installation.desc: We handle the entire process. Installation is carried out by our technical team with over 10 years of experience. Timelines: 3-5 days (straight), 3-4 weeks (curved), 4-8 weeks (lifts).

maintenance.title: Maintenance & after-sales
maintenance.desc: We offer preventive and corrective maintenance for virtually all market brands: HANDICARE, MINIVATOR, FREELIFT, THYSSEN, ACORN, BISON, VIMEC, HIROLIFT and many more.

coverage.title: Coverage area
coverage.desc: Málaga, Sevilla, Córdoba, Jaén, Huelva, Almería, Cádiz, Granada, Gibraltar, Murcia, Alicante, Valencia, Albacete, Cuenca, Toledo, Ciudad Real, Badajoz, Cáceres, Salamanca, Ávila, Segovia, Guadalajara and Madrid.

hub.title: Our products
hub.subtitle: The perfect accessibility solution for every staircase and every person.

stairlifts.title: Stairlifts
stairlifts.subtitle: The most economical and fastest solution for staircase problems. Available for straight, curved and outdoor staircases.

platforms.title: Platform Lifts
platforms.subtitle: The solution for wheelchair users or those with very limited mobility. More space and comfort on any staircase.

verticalLifts.title: Vertical Platform Lifts
verticalLifts.subtitle: The alternative to a traditional elevator. No construction work, no machine room. Indoor or outdoor installation.

ramps.title: Accessibility Ramps
ramps.subtitle: Permanent and portable ramps to overcome small level changes safely and comfortably.

poolLift.title: Pool Hoist
poolLift.subtitle: Your barrier-free pool. Hydraulic solution for private and communal pools. Installation on the pool edge without building work.

installations.title: Trusted Installations
installations.subtitle: Thousands of families, businesses and institutions trust Solteva for their accessibility needs.
